name: Chicken or Turkey Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Gravy or 1 can condensed cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Use as much sliced or cubed chicken or turkey as desired.
2. Partially cook frozen green beans.
3. Arrange the chicken, string beans, and almonds in layers in a greased, shallow casserole dish.
4. Spread the stuffing over the ingredients.
5. Pour milk over all.
6. Moisten 1-1/3 cups of the stuffing with 1/4 cup hot water and 2 tablespoons melted butter.
7. Bake in a hot (400°F) oven for 30 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
